nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant with complete context
nodes.label_negative: AI without sufficient context leading to poor output
nodes.grounding_span: If I explain my requirement in a complete way and provide enough context, it saves a lot of time

nodes.label: AI as communication formalizer
nodes.label_negative: Informal or unclear communication without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI a lot to phrase my ideas or what I want to send in a more formal way

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and ideation partner
nodes.grounding_span: any kind of brainstorming or ideation sessions are greatly improved by conversations with LLMs

nodes.label: AI as strategic sounding board for approach validation
nodes.label_negative: AI suggesting suboptimal or overly complex changes
nodes.grounding_span: ask the AI if they think it's the most optimal idea

nodes.label: AI as validation partner for self-implemented solutions
nodes.grounding_span: most of the times I validate whatever I came with with an AI

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For simple tasks I try to delegate it as much as possible

nodes.label: AI as iterative collaborator requiring adjustments
nodes.label_negative: AI producing final output without iteration
nodes.grounding_span: it's about collaboration, understanding their changes, asking for adjustments if something is off

nodes.label: AI frustration when context is insufficient
nodes.grounding_span: no matter how much context or how hard you try to explain something, the AI will not get it

nodes.label: AI as productivity booster with risk of cognitive decline
nodes.label_negative: AI use without dedicated non-AI practice
nodes.grounding_span: it might decrease the 'brain' productivity

nodes.label: AI as evolving agent threatening job security
nodes.label_negative: Human-specific skills to maintain job relevance
nodes.grounding_span: we will have to come with something very human-specific in order to not lose our jobs

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saves a lot of time

nodes.label: Effective communication with stakeholders
nodes.grounding_span: communicating with stakeholders

nodes.label: Creative ideation and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorming or ideation sessions are greatly improved

nodes.label: Optimal solution quality
nodes.grounding_span: ask the AI if they think it's the most optimal idea

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of them from scratch

nodes.label: Cognitive ability and independent problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: spend some dedicated time without AIs, just me and a piece of paper

nodes.label: Job security and human uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: in order to not lose our jobs

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code generation with good context
nodes.grounding_span: it saves a lot of time

nodes.label: Frustration when AI fails despite context
nodes.grounding_span: no matter how much context or how hard you try to explain something, the AI will not get it

nodes.label: Preference for manual handling of enjoyable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I like to think of them from scratch

nodes.label: Concern about cognitive decline from AI overuse
nodes.grounding_span: it might decrease the 'brain' productivity

nodes.label: Anxiety about job displacement due to AI evolution
nodes.grounding_span: we will have to come with something very human-specific in order to not lose our jobs

nodes.label: Contextual decomposition — breaking tasks into AI-ready components
nodes.grounding_span: I have to add my touches and think of it like I'm giving this task to a junior

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — adjusting AI output through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: understanding their changes, asking for adjustments if something is off, then again until it's a good version
